title: RBI Monetary Penalty on Appnit Technologies Limited
description: <cite index="53-3,53-4">The RBI handed out a fine to Appnit Technologies of ₹5.8 lakh for not following key financial rules. Appnit got in trouble for slipping up on KYC checks and letting e-KYC accounts run too long without proper ID updates.</cite> The penalty was issued alongside penalties to other entities for regulatory compliance deficiencies.
